items.title: CEO shake-ups in 2026: Why Berkshire isn't the one to watch
items.description: From pay packages to succession, investors have been keeping a close eye on CEOs in 2025. Harvard University executive education fellow and former Medtronic (MDT) CEO Bill George joins Market Domination to discuss the CEOs he's watching in 2026. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination.

items.title: Warren Buffett is stepping down as Berkshire Hathaway CEO. It's one of several big C-suite shake-ups in 2026.
items.description: These CEOs are taking the helm in 2026.

items.title: 5 Dow Jones Stocks Fell Over 10% in 2025. Here's Why They Are All Contrarian Buys for 2026.
items.description: Buying high-quality companies when they are out of favor can pay off in the long run.

items.title: Procter & Gamble is portfolio manager's 'dark horse' stock pick for 2026
items.description: STORY: EDITORS PLEASE NOTE: THIS HAS BEEN RESENT TO CORRECT THE SPELLING OF PROCTER & GAMBLE IN THE HEADLINE. NO CHANGES TO VIDEO.Mulberry says easing pressure on consumers could help drive demand for Procter & Gamble’s core brands."As you look at the pressures that they've been under, it's been around those issues that seem to be getting better, the currency exchange rate and also looking at more stable trading policies. If we combine that with lower overall costs in energy and housing, then we could start to see consumers come back to the name brands that they desperately want in home goods and baby care."
